ItacAcademyItem.Name: Sollevati-Bologna (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Furnace of stone, within which a fire heats an alembic, which sends a vapour into a vessel
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications related to this Academy, but not in British Library collections, include: Fiori epitalamici raccolti da gli Accademici Sollevati, e nelle felicissime nozze degl`ill.mi signori cavaliere, conte Filippo Maria Bentivogli ... e della contessa Maria Cecilia Vizani a` gli stessi presentati (In Bologna: per li Manolessi, 1672); also ascribed to this Academy, but from the previous century is: Oratio de prudentia habita in Academia Sublevatorum (1596)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
